## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] Script tested locally (`bash -n` + manual run)
- [ ] `shellcheck` passes on shell scripts
- [ ] SKILL.md updated if script capabilities changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] README.md updated if user-facing changes
